The '''1L10 drive''' was an engine created by [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom]]. It was often suggested as a modification for the [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] [[HT-2200 medium freighter]] to supplement the [[Koensayr Manufacturing/Legends|Koensayr Manufacturing]] single-tube ion drive.
